{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Heaven’s Glory Forger techniques
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Shattered [[Heaven’s Glory Forger techniques]] surrounded [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
